summary: HR New Employee Flow - Testing Complete. Fixed critical bug in frontend endpoints. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All features working after fix (Нов служител dialog, avatars with initials, auto-calculation, photo upload, EUR columns).

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Frontend was calling wrong API endpoints: /auth/users instead of /users, /employees/profile instead of /employees

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: EmployeesPage.js handleCreate() was using wrong endpoints (/auth/users -> /users, /employees/profile -> /employees)
Avatar component correctly shows initials (2 letters) in colored circle when no URL
Auto-calculation works correctly: 2500 EUR / 22 days = 113.64 EUR/day -> 14.2 EUR/hour
Camera overlay for photo upload present in edit mode
seed_data_creation: Created test employees via UI and API tests (prefixed with test_, ui_test_, ui_fixed_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Employee HR flow fully tested and working. FIXED frontend endpoint bug. Backend endpoints: POST /api/users (creates user with phone), POST /api/employees (creates profile with working_days_per_month), GET /api/employees (returns avatar_url, phone, first_name, last_name), PUT /api/employees/{id}/basic (accepts avatar_url). Frontend: 'Нов служител' button opens dialog with all required fields (Име, Фамилия, Имейл, Парола, Телефон, Роля) plus payroll section with auto-calculation. Employees list shows avatar circles with initials, phone, type, EUR rate columns.

Backend: POST /api/users creates new use.notes: Creates user with phone, first_name, last_name, email, role correctly

Backend: POST /api/employees creates emp.notes: Creates profile with pay_type, monthly_salary, daily_rate, hourly_rate, working_days_per_month, standard_hours_per_day

Backend: GET /api/employees returns avat.notes: All fields present in response, avatar_url included when set

Backend: PUT /api/employees/{id}/basic a.notes: Updates avatar_url, first_name, last_name, phone correctly

Frontend: Employees list page has 'Нов с.notes: Button with data-testid='new-employee-btn' present and clickable

Frontend: Create dialog has all required.notes: Име, Фамилия, Имейл, Парола, Телефон, Роля fields all present with correct testids

Frontend: Create dialog has payroll sect.notes: Shows formula: 2500 EUR / 22 = 113.64 EUR/ден → 14.2 EUR/ч, daily/hourly fields auto-populated in green

Frontend: Employees list shows initials.notes: Found 12+ avatar circles in table, shows 2-letter initials (TU, JB, DW, etc.)

Frontend: Employees list shows phone, ty.notes: Table headers: ИМЕ, РОЛЯ, ТЕЛЕФОН, ТИП, СТАВКА EUR, СТАТУС

Frontend: Employee detail shows avatar i.notes: Avatar 48x48 shown with initials, positioned in header next to name

Frontend: After create, navigates to new.notes: Fixed endpoint calls, now navigates to /employees/{newUserId} after successful creation

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints using real backend

bug_fixed.issue: handleCreate() was calling wrong API endpoints
bug_fixed.root_cause: Incorrect endpoint paths in frontend code
